title: elymus kokonoricus
intro: Elymus kokonoricus, also known as Kokonor wildrye, is a species of grass that is native to the Tibetan Plateau. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestive health. Elymus kokonoricus can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or extract, and is also used in traditional Tibetan medicine to treat various ailments.
